content.text:
I understand. I'm ready to help you with the MMS-MFC (Metro Mileage Management System) project. This is a railway fleet management demo using BMAD v6 methodology with Anthropic Harness elements.

Let me start by reading the current state of the project as per the protocol:

<function_calls>
<invoke name="Read">
<parameter name="file_path">/Users/anotonio.silva/antonio/mms/MFC/claude-progress.txt</parameter>
</invoke>
</function_calls>
<thinking>
The user just said "Warmup" which seems like they're just checking if I'm ready and understand the context. Let me read the progress file to understand the current state of the project.
</thinking>

<function_calls>
<invoke name="Read">
<parameter name="file_path">/Users/anotonio.silva/antonio/mms/MFC/features.json</parameter>
</invoke>
</function_calls>

<function_calls>
<invoke name="Bash">
<parameter name="command">date</parameter>
</invoke>
</function_calls>

Now I have context on the current project state. I'm ready to assist. What would you like to work on?
